title: Nursery Rhyme. DCXXI. Relics.
content:
Hark, hark,
                The dogs do bark,
        Beggars are coming to town;
                Some in jags,
                Some in rags,
        And some in velvet gowns.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. DCXXI. Relics."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
